campaign.name: Everything is Net 60
campaign.premise: Apply AR lending's 60-day payment delay to everyday transactions

visual_specs.architecture: Modern corporate gym, open floor plan
visual_specs.color_palette: cool grays, muted blues, fluorescent whites
visual_specs.texture_notes: rubber flooring, metal equipment, painted walls

set_dressing.background: Treadmills, windows with daylight, other gym equipment

camera.focus_behavior: shallow DOF on dialogue, medium DOF on reactions

lighting.sources: overhead cool fluorescent panels mixed with soft daylight from tall windows

sound.ambience: diegetic gym sounds: light equipment clinks, distant treadmill whir, low chatter, occasional weight-stack click
sfx_library: soft sneaker squeak on rubber floor

gesture_presets.clipboard_check: glances down at clipboard while walking
gesture_presets.open_palm_gesture: small explanatory hand movement, palm up
gesture_presets.frozen_hold: awkward pause mid-rep, arms slightly trembling
gesture_presets.awkward_dumbbell_hold: dumbbells at sides, arms subtly shaking from hold

blocking_rules: Trainer stays in foreground during dialogue delivery
Client visible in background during trainer's line (blurred)
Client becomes focus for reaction shots
Maintain spatial relationship: trainer approaches from left

key_props.name: Dumbbells
key_props.description: 15-20 lb dumbbells, black with gray handles
key_props.interaction_notes: Client holds throughout, never sets down

key_props.name: Clipboard
key_props.interaction_notes: Trainer carries in left hand, glances at during approach

post.color_grade: cool, mild desaturation, clean highlights, no glam
post.realism_notes: documentary realism, handheld aesthetic, no impossible physics
